title: LoftyDailyRewards
description: The simplest, best Daily Rewards plugin for your sever!
body:
![LoftyDailyRewards](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0283820bd37488ba3935ac4e14d787ecc76025ed.jpeg)
# Keep Players Coming Back - Reward Loyalty Daily!
A simple to use plugin that rewards players for logging in everyday!  
[Source Code](https://github.com/Swiftens/LoftyDailyRewards) | [Wiki](https://github.com/Swiftens/LoftyDailyRewards/wiki)  

## Infinite Days
You can limit your rewards to as many days are you want! 1 day? 30 days? 365 days? It's as simple as adding a number in rewards.yml. If a player goes beyond the limit, their current streak continues but their reward goes back from day 1.  

## Fully Customizable GUI
From 9 slots to 54 slots. The GUI is fully customizable, allowing you to create a design you believe is up to your standards. Custom Model Data is also supported on items!

<details>
<summary>Spoiler: 9 Slots GUI</summary>

![9 Slot GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d8701ec5fa41897a65058d522ad9f4573802c4f9.png)

</details>

<details>
<summary>Spoiler: 54 Slots GUI</summary>

![54 Slot GUI](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2c4581e54ee857a4c1456b8bef5a91c395a1c338.png)

</details>


## PlaceholderAPI Support
Commands and items support placeholders using PlaceholderAPI (maybe). Some placeholders are added as well!
- %dailyrewards_current_streak% - Returns the player's current streak
- %dailyrewards_highest_streak% - Returns the player's highest streak
- %dailyrewards_time_remaining% - Returns the player's time remaining (configurable in config.yml)

## Additional Features
- **MySQL Support**

## Check Out My Other Plugins!
